_patch_meta.produced_by: Claude AI — Session B Stage 1 VC re-run under WA-VerseContext-Instruction-v2.5
_patch_meta.description: Targeted VC re-run for 4 terms with unclassified verses identified during Session B Stage 1 audit. G1654 (5 verses → 3167-001), H2617B (127 verses → 1633-001/002/003/SET_ASIDE), H7356A (4 verses → 729-001/SET_ASIDE), H7358 (25 verses → 2 new groups). H2603B delete-status groups (2325-001/002) and their dimension_index entries delete_flagged. CC must resolve group_id for H7358 verse_context inserts using group_code after group insert.
_patch_meta.note_for_cc: H7358 verse_context inserts carry group_id = 'RESOLVE:{group_code}'. Claude Code must look up the newly inserted group id by group_code (1613-001 and 1613-002) and substitute the correct integer id before inserting verse_context records for H7358.

record.context_description: Term names the womb as the threshold of human existence over which God exercises sovereign care — the space where divine compassion, calling, and consecration originate before birth
record.notes: Session B VC re-run 2026-04-12 — H7358 re.chem had no context groups; group A covers divine sovereignty over the womb

operations.description: Insert new verse_context_group 1613-001 for H7358 re.chem — divine sovereignty over the womb

record.context_description: Term names the womb as the origin of human existence — its use in lament and ethical reflection grounds the human person's creaturely condition (suffering, moral nature, shared creatureliness) in the body's most foundational threshold
record.notes: Session B VC re-run 2026-04-12 — group B covers womb as origin of human creaturely condition

operations.description: Insert new verse_context_group 1613-002 for H7358 re.chem — womb as origin of human existence and creaturely condition
